original_image_tags: The page appears to be the reverse side of a typed document. Faint, mirrored text is visible through the paper, indicating typing on the opposite side. The visible side contains several overlapping ink stamps, primarily in blue and purple, indicating various "RECEIVED" dates and times in January 1949 by the FBI and its officials (Ladd, Toolson, Higgins, Director). The stamps are oriented in different directions. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top center and shows signs of age and wear.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping blue ink stamps visible. One stamp reads 'RECEIVED - LAND', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'FBI', 'JAN 24 4 55 PM '40'. Another stamp reads 'JAN 26 9 01 AM '40', 'RECEIVED - FBI'. Another stamp reads 'JAN 26 10 22 AM '40', 'RECEIVED - HANDLER', 'FBI', 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE'.

judge.reason: Description A describes stamps with different text (e.g., 'Ladd, Toolson, Higgins, Director') and different years ('1949') than the specific verbatim text quoted in Description B (e.g., 'RECEIVED - LAND', 'JAN 24 4 55 PM '40'), representing a contradiction on the actual stamp text.
